SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: BERENSTEIN, SIDNEY SUBSTITUTED FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT AS ATTORNEY FOR KIRCHER, VINCENT

MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF KIRCHER, VINCENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR MAY-13-1998 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 206 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON MAY-20-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
JURY TRIAL STRICKEN, TO COURT TRIAL ON MAY-20-1998 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 220 PER DEPARTMENT AT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

DEPT. 624. SUE KAPLAN, COMMISSIONER. D. CARTER, CLERK. ROMY BARULICH, CSR. PRESENT WERE SIDNEY BERENSTEIN ATTY. FOR PLAINTIFF VINCENT KIRCHER WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. ALSO PRESENT WAS WITNESS ANTHONY CAVELLO FOR PLAINTIFF. DEFT. SEAN CUNNINGHAM DID NOT APPEAR. PRIMA FACIA PROVE UP AS TO DEFENDANT. EXHIBITS, I.D/EVID. THE COURT AFTER HEARING THE TESTIMONY AND REVIEWING THE EXHIBITS ORDERED JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF FOR RESTITUTION OF THE PREMISE AND FOR PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES IN THE SUM OF $1,240.00. EXHIBITS WITHDRAWN.
RM220/#1/LITTLE. STIPULATION THAT COMMISIIONER SUE KAPLAN MAY ACT AS A JUDGE PRO TEM SIGNED BY PLTF'S COUNSEL. DEFT NOT PRESENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CUNNINGHAM, SEAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1685 SACRAMENTO STREET #32 S.F. CA. 94109 $1,240.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,240.00, LEASE FORFEITED, NO STAY ON THIS JUDGMENT EXECUTION.
